フィルムが目を覚ますまで世話をしていた兵士は、<br>起き上がった彼女に深く頭を:
The soldier who had been caring for Film until she regained
consciousness bowed deeply as she sat up.
わたしがいいって言ったんだもの、<br>気にしなくていいのよ。: I told you it's fine, so don't worry about it.
誰かを求めてしまう気持ちは、<br>わたしにだって分かるもの……: I understand what it's like to yearn for someone too...
穏やかに言ったフィルムに、兵士は納得した様子だった。<br>やはり好きな人ができ:
The soldier seemed convinced by Film's calm words. "So you really
have found someone you love, haven't you?"
最近のフィルムさんはさらに綺麗になっていて、<br>素敵な恋をしてると思っていた:
The soldier continued, saying Film had become even more beautiful
lately and must be in love.
そんな風に見えていたのね……: So that's how I looked to you...
誰にも言いません、今日のことを思い出に明日からも頑張ります。<br>そう言って、:
"I won't tell anyone. I'll treasure this memory and do my best starting
tomorrow." With that, the soldier thanked her contentedly.
え、ええ。<br>満足してもらえたなら、よかったわ。: Ah, well... I'm glad you're satisfied, then.
……わたしは、素敵な恋をしてるのね。<br>だから司令官くんのことを思うと、毎日:
...I really am in love with someone wonderful. That's why thinking of
Commander makes every day so happy.
あら、どうしたの、ノワール。<br>何か納得のいかない様子だけど。: Oh, what's wrong, Noir? You seem dissatisfied with something.
……もしかして、色々助けてもらってるのに、<br>わたしだけ恋を楽しんでるから怒:
...Could it be that you're angry because I'm the only one enjoying this
love while you've been helping me all this time?
